response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation contexts, has no demonstrated exposure to IEC 62443, MQTT, REST in industrial systems, or cloud platforms like Azure, and their recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — not the core C++/STL/concurrent systems required for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across diverse systems and languages
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to work on distributed, event-driven, and real-time systems
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ or STL development in industrial or embedded contexts
No evidence of IEC 62443, MQTT, OPC UA, or industrial cybersecurity experience
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript and DLang, not aligned with C++ core requirements
